recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure to Maintain CARE EDGE 1+ Rating
recommendations.description: Strengthen and expand ESG disclosures in line with BRSR and GRI frameworks to avoid SEBI scrutiny and maintain the CARE EDGE ESG 1+ rating, preserving investor confidence and cost of capital benefits.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹30,000 Cr debt saves ₹60-120 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India enhanced disclosures leading to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Pursue Inclusion in Dow Jones Sustainability Index
recommendations.description: Initiate targeted improvements in sustainability practices and reporting to qualify for DJSI inclusion, capturing a 5-10% valuation premium and attracting ESG-mandated fund inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: A 5% valuation premium on ₹50,000 Cr market cap equals ₹2,500 Cr uplift
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Peers in power sector have not yet achieved DJSI inclusion, enabling first-mover advantage

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Rating in Investor Communications
recommendations.description: Develop a targeted investor relations campaign highlighting the CARE EDGE ESG 1+ rating to enhance trust, attract ESG funds, and improve talent acquisition.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved trust can reduce cost of capital by 10 bps, saving ₹30 Cr annually

recommendations.title: Publish Comprehensive TCFD Report Including Scope 3 Emissions
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a detailed TCFD-aligned climate risk report including Scope 3 financed emissions to enhance transparency and attract ESG-focused foreign institutional investors.
recommendations.responsible_party: Head of Climate Risk and Reporting
recommendations.profitability_link: Matching SBI’s approach could attract ₹3000 Cr in ESG-mandated FII inflows, improving liquidity and valuation
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India’s TCFD report led to significant ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Integrate ESRS Compliance for EU Operations
recommendations.description: Align ESG disclosures with ESRS standards to ensure compliance with upcoming CSRD regulations for EU operations, avoiding legal penalties and reputational damage.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding potential legal penalties estimated at ₹50 Cr and maintaining market access in EU

Pursue Inclusion in Dow Jones Sustainability Index
